title: GT Lib
description: tech lib used by gt5r and gt4r
body:
The building blocks of GT5 Reimagined and numerous of its addons to come.

 

It's an extensive API for 1.18+ that offers features like:

- Streamlining registration of blocks, items and more registry compatible objects

- Extensive builders for data generation

- Offers runtime data generation instead of compile time in modern Minecraft versions

- Extensive recipe generation

- Materials and parts system

- Configurable world generation simplified

- Easy machine system, still largely focused around eu machines, but it does have the ability to do rf machines.

- Cover system for said machines and pipes.
